name: FAISAL ISLAMIC BK EGYPT -$US
summary: FAISAL ISLAMIC BK EGYPT -$US is likely a USD denominated share class of Faisal Islamic Bank of Egypt which operates according to Islamic Sharia principles, offering a range of banking products and services. These include deposit accounts, financing, investment products, and other financial solutions compliant with Islamic law. The bank is headquartered in Cairo, Egypt.
